Learn Japanese with songs ✨

latestIgtvVideos.title: JET PROGRAM IN JAPAN study/work abroad
latestIgtvVideos.caption: @thewrightwaytogo fresh graduate who headed straight to rural Japan on the JET Program (1.5 years experience) who transitioned to work for a huge corporate company in the heart of Tokyo … gives us the inside scoop from how to apply to work culture to living in 🇺🇸vs. 🇯🇵

latestIgtvVideos.title: LGBTQIA+ & Drag culture in Japan w/ Goma Dango
latestIgtvVideos.caption: Thank u to our special guest  @gomadangotokyo @hausofgaishoku for spilling the tea 🍵✨

latestIgtvVideos.title: Dance & Idol Industry in Tokyo w/ Laura
latestIgtvVideos.caption: Laura @yamiklaura talks us thru her experience of coming from a small town girl in France to pursue her dreams of becoming an idol-dance performer in Tokyo. She’s off to Osaka next week!

latestIgtvVideos.title: Volunteering at the Tokyo Olympics/Paralympic 2021
latestIgtvVideos.caption:
SKIP TO: 39:24

Today’s guest is Kiki from Italy! 🇮🇹 she gives us the inside scoop on what it’s like to be inside the Olympic Village. We talk about the volunteer perks, the Covid-19 measures, Japan’s economic pressure, the boycotts and protests. 

Please wish her good luck this week! 💪🏻💕

Connect w her:
@kiky_von_dream @kikyokompa

latestIgtvVideos.title: Write Beautiful Hiragana✍🏻
latestIgtvVideos.caption: Full video on my YT channel. Some drills, tips and tricks to get it perfect 👌🏻

latestIgtvVideos.title: “Stay With Me/ 真夜中のドア” MV Cover
latestIgtvVideos.caption:
80’s City Pop made a comeback! This song is about missing a lover. 

Here’s my story: 
I moved to Tokyo to be closer to my grandma. Since Covid hit Yokohama in Feb ‘20, I haven’t seen her for over a year. I am surrounded by her memories (a house full of old albums, retro decor, her kimono, props I use for Tik Tok). It’s as if she has prepared everything I needed to make Cyber Bunny happen. 

I pray for the day I get to see her again. I wish for all of us to see our loved ones again.

latestIgtvVideos.title: “Can’t Be Right” (正しくなれない)
latestIgtvVideos.caption:
“We met through a lie, but we are better off knowing the truth” 

Find your truth 

MV also available on YT. Hiragana singing tutorial coming soon 😚

#thepromisedneverland #約束のネバーランド　#アニメ　#アニソン

latestIgtvVideos.title: Christmas Market in Tokyo 2020
latestIgtvVideos.caption:
Photoshoot in Ginza Shopping Strip 
Largest German-themed Tokyo Xmas Market in Hibiya Park 
Things to do while you wait in line for the Roppongi Hills Xmas Market 
(i.e. The Promised Neverland anime cafe & museum, Sky tower observatory, Takashi Murakami cafe, Keyakizaka illumination photo spot, window shopping) 

Here are things you can do during the holidays next year! Watch the rest on my YT channel. Link in bio ✨

Thank you to my bestie Willie @thewrightwaytogo

latestPosts.caption:
You get a treat if you comment your zodiac animal ⬇️⬇️⬇️ Bonus points in 🇯🇵✨ 

@koyukisnowspitz 

Full song on my YouTube 

#japaneseculture #japanese #nihongojouzu #jlpt

You may know me as the Hiragana Girl on YouTube. Most people will come across my Hiragana Song video to learn Japanese. Or maybe your sensei showed my videos in class. I’m the girl behind the bunny ears and here’s what I stand for: 

I started cyber bunny in 2018. Every day I’m working towards producing my own kids tv show for bilingual learners of Japanese and English. I believe education is key to success, freedom and opportunities. 

Studying is not always fun, but I hope I can make it a positive experience whenever students of all ages watch me. Celebrate the little wins! It won’t happen overnight! 

#japaneseculture #japanese #hiragana #cyberbunny

📍Pop up at ZeroBase Omotesando
Until this Sunday

Come take cute pics at Elizabeth Himeko’s bedroom and try the new waterproof heroine mascara 

📍 Beni Museum 
Try their 200 yr old secret lip stain 

#KISSMEMascara #TheStrongProof #mascara #makeuplover

latestPosts.caption:
Hello! 👋 I am a self-produced performance artist playing her alter-ego Cyber Bunny who teaches Japanese language and culture. I am a singer-song writer specifically for kids and I also script, film, edit all my content. I am my own manager, tax accountant and stylist. Oh yeah! I give private tours in Tokyo on the side to help me pay for this production and my puppy @koyukisnowspitz 🐾🐶

After several tests over the past year, I could finally make my 2D original character move, lip sync and blink 😭🤍 

My main production can be found on my YouTube channel ✌🏻💗the survival guide to living in Japan. Ja mata ne!

#animation2d #japaneseculture #artistsupportartists

taggedUsers.full_name: Cyber Bunny🇯🇵Private Guide & Documented Japan Tours

latestPosts.caption:
😅Did anyone turn out completely different? 

For me, type-1 diabetes made me realize to follow your authentic path. I could die early. I could go into diabetic coma. I could be broke and not afford insulin. 

I started as a shy, observant, focused, disciplined girl that was afraid to tell her mom the American cafeteria food sucks so I ate two ketchup packets for lunch for the next two years. I came home STARVING. 

Were you always the same before? Or did something happen that changed you? 

#japaneseculture #japanese #throwback #shessoperfect

Tokyo Skytree X Puella Magi Madoka Magica (魔法少女まどか☆マギカ) collaboration 

✨Meet and greet with Sorakara chan (see schedule on website)

🎟️Admission required

期間限定のキャラクターカフェ（限定フード＆ドリンクが登場）

各キャラクターをイメージした限定ライティング（ライトアップ）

※入場料が別途必要です

Thank you to my backup dancers @foxmaskdaze @kojimochi 👯‍♂️

#tokyoskytree #puellamagimadokamagica #魔法少女まどかマギカ #東京スカイツリー #pr
hashtags: 魔法少女まどかマギカ

latestPosts.caption:
Japan is “affordable” when it comes to diabetes care. 

My plan in my 20’s was to live in the West Coast in the U.S. to be with the rest of the Tiktokers. That plan didn’t happen and I may have dodged a bullet. I was in Japan for a bit meaning to move to LA eventually, and then Covid happen. 

I had to work around my diabetes bc rationing insulin due to high prices in Hawaii isn’t worth my life.  I couldn’t afford insulin pump therapy in Hawaii. So I  gave up the LA dream and chose to live in Japan that had a higher QOL for me. Japan doesn’t fully cover insulin either but at least it is 70% covered by National Health Insurance and the food is much better for the body. 

Japan wasn’t in the plan but I’m grateful NOW that my diabetes led me here 🙋🏻‍♀️

Diabetic friends, you are not alone 🥹 health is wealth ✨you can still make your dreams work

#diabadass #t1d #diabeticinjapan

What a $10k Hawaii wedding looks & feels like 
ハワイで1万ドル以下の結婚式を挙げました

Listening and reading practice for bilinguals 

To those planning a wedding in this economy: 
Yes it’s POSSIBLE! To have your Pinterest wedding within budget! I chose the MOST expensive destination.

Lots of sacrifices, effort, planning and several guest list revisions. If you’re a bride who knows what she wants, you do not need a wedding planner or day of coordinator. Check out my previous post for creative ways on how to save! 

Timeline- 
✅booked out venue one year out exactly before wedding
✅save the date invites & wedding website sent one year out 
✅finalized guest list 6 months out 
✅wedding decor, table seating two months out
✅florals 3 days out 

✨Wedding team ✨
Venue: @waikikileia 
Photo: @jasondengphoto 
Cake: @acakelife 
Bar & rehearsal dinner: @tanakaoftokyo 
Hair/ makeup: @saeko.hairmake 
Couples Massage for bride & groom: @luana_waikiki 

#wedding #hawaiiwedding #waikikleia #diywedding

Save this post ⬇️ 2026 brides!!! 👰🏻‍♀️How I managed to budget within $10k for my wedding in Hawaii 2025

Save this when it’s your turn ✅ or send to a bride-to-be on how they can save $$$

Thank you to the dream team ✨🙏💗I’ve had a great experience working with all of you 

Venue: @waikikileia 
Photo: @jasondengphoto 
Last photo: @shaynejenevieve 
Cake: @acakelife 
Bar & rehearsal dinner: @tanakaoftokyo 
Hair/ makeup: @saeko.hairmake 
Couples Massage for bride & groom: @luana_waikiki 
Hotel we stayed at: @hotellacroix 
Best Maid of Honor✨ @tanaka_bo 

#wedding #hawaiiwedding #waikikleia

latestPosts.caption:
Hello! 👋 I am a self-produced performance artist playing her alter-ego Cyber Bunny who teaches Japanese language and culture. I am a singer-song writer specifically for kids and I also script, film, edit all my content. I am my own manager, tax accountant and stylist. Oh yeah! I give private tours in Tokyo on the side to help me pay for this production and my puppy @koyukisnowspitz 🐾🐶

After several tests over the past year, I could finally make my 2D original character move, lip sync and blink 😭🤍 

My main production can be found on my YouTube channel ✌🏻💗the survival guide to living in Japan. Ja mata ne!

#animation2d #japaneseculture #artistsupportartists

latestPosts.caption:
😅Did anyone turn out completely different? 

For me, type-1 diabetes made me realize to follow your authentic path. I could die early. I could go into diabetic coma. I could be broke and not afford insulin. 

I started as a shy, observant, focused, disciplined girl that was afraid to tell her mom the American cafeteria food sucks so I ate two ketchup packets for lunch for the next two years. I came home STARVING. 

Were you always the same before? Or did something happen that changed you? 

#japaneseculture #japanese #throwback #shessoperfect

latestPosts.caption:
Japan is “affordable” when it comes to diabetes care. 

My plan in my 20’s was to live in the West Coast in the U.S. to be with the rest of the Tiktokers. That plan didn’t happen and I may have dodged a bullet. I was in Japan for a bit meaning to move to LA eventually, and then Covid happen. 

I had to work around my diabetes bc rationing insulin due to high prices in Hawaii isn’t worth my life.  I couldn’t afford insulin pump therapy in Hawaii. So I  gave up the LA dream and chose to live in Japan that had a higher QOL for me. Japan doesn’t fully cover insulin either but at least it is 70% covered by National Health Insurance and the food is much better for the body. 

Japan wasn’t in the plan but I’m grateful NOW that my diabetes led me here 🙋🏻‍♀️

Diabetic friends, you are not alone 🥹 health is wealth ✨you can still make your dreams work

#diabadass #t1d #diabeticinjapan

What a $10k Hawaii wedding looks & feels like 
ハワイで1万ドル以下の結婚式を挙げました

Listening and reading practice for bilinguals 

To those planning a wedding in this economy: 
Yes it’s POSSIBLE! To have your Pinterest wedding within budget! I chose the MOST expensive destination.

Lots of sacrifices, effort, planning and several guest list revisions. If you’re a bride who knows what she wants, you do not need a wedding planner or day of coordinator. Check out my previous post for creative ways on how to save! 

Timeline- 
✅booked out venue one year out exactly before wedding
✅save the date invites & wedding website sent one year out 
✅finalized guest list 6 months out 
✅wedding decor, table seating two months out
✅florals 3 days out 

✨Wedding team ✨
Venue: @waikikileia 
Photo: @jasondengphoto 
Cake: @acakelife 
Bar & rehearsal dinner: @tanakaoftokyo 
Hair/ makeup: @saeko.hairmake 
Couples Massage for bride & groom: @luana_waikiki 

#wedding #hawaiiwedding #waikikleia #diywedding

Hello! 👋 I am a self-produced performance artist playing her alter-ego Cyber Bunny who teaches Japanese language and culture. I am a singer-song writer specifically for kids and I also script, film, edit all my content. I am my own manager, tax accountant and stylist. Oh yeah! I give private tours in Tokyo on the side to help me pay for this production and my puppy @koyukisnowspitz 🐾🐶

After several tests over the past year, I could finally make my 2D original character move, lip sync and blink 😭🤍 

My main production can be found on my YouTube channel ✌🏻💗the survival guide to living in Japan. Ja mata ne!

Were you always the same before? Or did something happen that changed you?

#japanese #sakuraco #tokyotreat #japaneseculture #japanesesnacks #omiyage #japanesegifts  #thereluctanttraveler

You may know me as the Hiragana Girl on YouTube. Most people will come across my Hiragana Song video to learn Japanese. Or maybe your sensei showed my videos in class. I’m the girl behind the bunny ears and here’s what I stand for: 

I started cyber bunny in 2018. Every day I’m working towards producing my own kids tv show for bilingual learners of Japanese and English. I believe education is key to success, freedom and opportunities. 

Studying is not always fun, but I hope I can make it a positive experience whenever students of all ages watch me. Celebrate the little wins! It won’t happen overnight! 

#japaneseculture #japanese #hiragana #cyberbunny

The number one perk of being a February baby is that everyone gifts you strawberries 🍓🤭 

Scroll to the last slide: 3 THINGS I LEARNED FROM 32 years of LIVING 

Afternoon tea / all-you-can-eat strawberry course at the Aman Tokyo with @oyadoo_jp team ✨ so many things to celebrate! Thank you for working with me for the past 4 years. 

#afternoontea #strawberry #amantokyo

How to eat ehomaki for good luck in 2026 by Feb 3 🇯🇵 lucky direction in 2026 is the same as 2023 😂 

🧭SOUTH SOUTH EAST 南南東

Every year, the people of Japan shoves a roll down their throats on my birthday 🎉 Feb 3 ✨ I feel so special 🙂‍↕️

#japaneseculture #ehomaki #恵方巻き

America needs some love today 💗🇺🇸 we are a country filled with diversity but despite our different backgrounds, here are some things that makes us so friendly, open and relatable. Japanese people have a difficult time with some of these. No where is perfect, and that’s ok! 

my fellow Americans, how are you doing? Keep your children, neighbors and loved ones safe. 

Hope that focusing on the positive can lift your mood. Love and kindness wins in the end. That’s how every story goes. #proudtobeanamerican #immigrantsmakeamericagreat

(PART 2: DIY) $10k wedding in Hawaii in 2025

Here are my notes for any couples that might need a little help staying inspired and organized 🤗🩵

My Amazon Storefront (link in bio)

Thank u for the helpful advice in part 1 post! 🙏

Photo @shaynejenevieve 
Dress by @sbwedding.co 
Makeup @saeko.hairmake 
Florals @hanapua_flowers_hawaii 

#wedding #hawaiiwedding #weddingdress #diywedding

Wedding content UNLOCKED ✌🏻 see my feed post for the breakdown $$ of a $10k wedding in Hawaii. 

I spent the summer in Hawaii planning my small backyard wedding. I was a little darker, a little bluer back then. Lost a friend and had one small kine wedding drama. 

To be continued… 

#wedding #transition

What if we combine 🇻🇳summer roll 🤝🇯🇵maki roll , two iconic dishes? 

Vietnamese food is still my favorite cuisine til this day! 

Make sure you grab a roll! Today (Feb 3) is when the whole nation of Japan is shoving something down their throats 😅in silence 

#japaneseculture #traveljapan #japanese #ehomaki #恵方巻き
Culture appreciation 🇯🇵🤎 #lifeinjapan #japaneseparade #japaneseculture

Part 1 - Challenge Accepted: $10k backyard wedding in Hawaii in 2025 for 30 guests 

I’m absolutely crazy. How am I going to pull this off?? 

After doing the math, I am on track towards a $10k budget with a $300 emergency cushion. This couldn’t be possible without the support of family and friends. 

This is for the bold adventurous bride and although I do not recommend, I can share how I did it. I hope this information is useful for future newlyweds in creating their dream backyard wedding on a budget. 

Note: I’m counting pre-tax and pre-tip. Ring and hotel costs are not included in the $10k. 

It can be easy or you can make it hard. Decision fatigue is so real and it literally made me ill. 

Stay tuned for part 2: DIY & thrifting! The fun part!

Got any wedding advice for me??! 😭

Photo by @shaynejenevieve 
Dress by @sbwedding.co 
Makeup @saeko.hairmake 
Florals @hanapua_flowers_hawaii 
Ring @sakurahoseki 

#wedding #hawaiiwedding #weddingdress

Japan is “affordable” when it comes to diabetes care. 

My plan in my 20’s was to live in the West Coast in the U.S. to be with the rest of the Tiktokers. That plan didn’t happen and I may have dodged a bullet. I was in Japan for a bit meaning to move to LA eventually, and then Covid happen. 

I had to work around my diabetes bc rationing insulin due to high prices in Hawaii isn’t worth my life.  I couldn’t afford insulin pump therapy in Hawaii. So I  gave up the LA dream and chose to live in Japan that had a higher QOL for me. Japan doesn’t fully cover insulin either but at least it is 70% covered by National Health Insurance and the food is much better for the body. 

Japan wasn’t in the plan but I’m grateful NOW that my diabetes led me here 🙋🏻‍♀️

Diabetic friends, you are not alone 🥹 health is wealth ✨you can still make your dreams work

#diabadass #t1d #diabeticinjapan
